title: Add support for custom contexts
body:
A "context", as pertaining to image builds, is a Dockerfile/Containerfile plus all local files that can be referenced via commands such as COPY, etc, in the Dockerfile.  The context is typically serialized as a tarball.

Podman-py's `build()` method already offers a couple of convenient ways to automatically construct this serialized tarball.

This PR adds the ability to directly pass in an already-constructed context tarball.  This addresses #551 .

comments.body: This is my first PR here, so I'm sure I'm doing something wrong!  Let me know; happy to take a look.

thanks @aseering and welcome.

I think this can be merged once you address the comments of the formatter.

you can just install `pre-commit`, then either run it on all the codebase or edit your commit, and it should autofix everything.

Also, I'd suggest to add `Fixes: https://gh-issuelink` to you commit message, so it will be easy to track and auto close your issue :)
